case_title: SASHA S LEAL VELEZ VS. BRANDIN LAKEE TOLLIVEV

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY LEAL VELEZ, SASHA S AS TO DEFENDANT LAKEE TOLLIVER, BRANDIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-15-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAKEE TOLLIVER, BRANDIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEAL VELEZ, SASHA S IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LAKEE TOLLIVER, BRANDIN I CREDIT PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY THAT DEFENDANT WAS A DIFFICULT ROOMMATE, BUT DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT WAS NOT SO EGREGIOUS AS TO CONSTRUCTIVELY EVICT PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT'S FAILED EVICTION NOTICE DID NOT TERMINATE THE LEASE. THUS THE LEASE WAS IN EFFECT AND REQUIRED PLAINTIFF TO GIVE 30 DAYS NOTICE TO TERMINATE THE LEASE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEAL VELEZ, SASHA S AS TO DEFENDANT LAKEE TOLLIVER, BRANDIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF SASHA S. LEAL VELEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRANDIN LAKEE TOLLIVER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
